name: Lee Ball

availability.engagement_type: Outside IR35. Lee operates as an independent consultant. Engagements are deliverables- or outcomes-based, not staff substitution.

services: Team structure, hiring, and recruitment strategy
Delivery tooling and ways of working, including AI-assisted workflows

target_clients.situation: Teams that need structure, improved delivery processes, or operational clarity as they grow

notes: Lee is actively building familiarity with AI tools and integrates them into his working practice. He is not a deep AI technologist or ML specialist — AI is part of the toolkit, not the core offering.
